daily.today_energy: Your vibe is magnetic rn. The cosmos is giving you that main character energy—lean into conversations that feel a little risky. Something's shifting behind the scenes, and you're gonna feel it.
daily.love: If you're coupled up, your person might surprise you with something thoughtful. Single? Someone's been lowkey thinking about you. Either way, authenticity is your love language today.
daily.career: Your ideas are hitting different right now. This is the moment to pitch that thing you've been sitting on or speak up in meetings. Your intuition about what's next is sharp.
daily.health: Your body's asking for movement—could be a walk, dancing in your room, whatever gets you flowing. Listen to that restless energy; it's not anxiety, it's activation.

weekly.overview: This week's cosmic energy is asking you to trust your gut more than usual. Mercury's moving through your sector of authenticity, so speaking your truth feels less risky and more necessary. Lean into conversations you've been putting off.
weekly.love: Your romantic vibe is giving 'effortlessly magnetic' energy. Whether you're single or coupled up, there's a magnetism happening that has nothing to do with trying. Just be genuinely yourself and watch what unfolds naturally around you.
weekly.career: Projects you've been sitting on are ready for momentum. This isn't about forcing things—it's about recognizing which opportunities actually align with where you want to go. Your instincts about what's worth your time are spot on.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for more movement and less stagnation. Whether that's dancing, hiking, or just switching up your routine, flow is your friend right now. Pay attention to what makes you feel alive versus what drains you.
